since_last: 37% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.07%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.30% · BTC +0.18% · Gold +0.01% · Nasdaq100 -1.34%. 37% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.07%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.07%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -10.09%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.07%, NOW +5.13%, DDOG +4.62%, ADBE +4.51%, WDAY +3.78%. Laggards: TER -10.09%, INTC -9.15%, AMBA -8.33%, AMAT -7.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.09% at $152.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
